_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Bot WhatsApp
author: TirzxShowz@gmail.com
description: Egg untuk menjalankan bot WhatsApp berbasis Node.js (Baileys, whatsapp-web.js, dll)
startup: if [[ -d .git ]] && [[ {{AUTO_UPDATE}} == "1" ]]; then git pull; fi; if [[ ! -z ${NODE_PACKAGES} ]]; then npm install ${NODE_PACKAGES}; fi; if [[ ! -z ${UNNODE_PACKAGES} ]]; then npm uninstall ${UNNODE_PACKAGES}; fi; if [ -f /home/container/package.json ]; then npm install; fi; ${CMD_RUN}

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
apt update
apt install -y git curl jq file unzip make gcc g++ python3 python3-pip libtool

npm install npm@latest -g

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

if [ "${USER_UPLOAD}" == "true" ] || [ "${USER_UPLOAD}" == "1" ]; then
    echo "Assuming user knows what they are doing"
    exit 0
fi

if [[ ${GIT_ADDRESS} != *.git ]]; then
    GIT_ADDRESS=${GIT_ADDRESS}.git
fi

if [ -z "${USERNAME}" ] && [ -z "${ACCESS_TOKEN}" ]; then
    echo "Using anonymous git clone"
else
    GIT_ADDRESS="https://${USERNAME}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@$(echo ${GIT_ADDRESS} | cut -d/ -f3-)"
fi

if [ "$(ls -A /mnt/server)" ]; then
    echo "/mnt/server directory is not empty."
    if [ -d .git ]; then
        ORIGIN=$(git config --get remote.origin.url)
        if [ "${ORIGIN}" == "${GIT_ADDRESS}" ]; then
            echo "Pulling latest from git"
            git pull
        fi
    fi
else
    echo "Cloning repository..."
    if [ -z ${BRANCH} ]; then
        git clone ${GIT_ADDRESS} .
    else
        git clone --single-branch --branch ${BRANCH} ${GIT_ADDRESS} .
    fi
fi

echo "Installing Node.js packages..."
if [[ ! -z ${NODE_PACKAGES} ]]; then
    npm install ${NODE_PACKAGES}
fi

if [ -f /mnt/server/package.json ]; then
    npm install --production
fi

echo "Installation complete!"
exit 0

variables.name: Git Repo Address
variables.description: GitHub/GitLab repo URL untuk clone bot WhatsApp

variables.name: Install Branch
variables.description: Branch yang akan di-clone (kosongkan untuk default branch)

variables.name: User Uploaded Files
variables.description: Skip git clone jika user upload file sendiri (0=false, 1=true)

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Auto pull latest code saat startup (0=false, 1=true)

variables.name: Git Username
variables.description: Username untuk private repo (kosongkan jika public)

variables.name: Git Access Token
variables.description: Personal Access Token untuk private repo

variables.name: Command Run
variables.description: Command untuk menjalankan bot (contoh: npm start, node index.js)
